permisos_tenant_select.name: permisos_tenant_select
permisos_tenant_select.using: "permisos"."rol_id" in (select id from roles where tenant_id = (select current_tenant_id()) or tenant_id is null)

permisos_tenant_modify.name: permisos_tenant_modify
permisos_tenant_modify.using: "permisos"."rol_id" in (select id from roles where tenant_id = (select current_tenant_id()) or tenant_id is null)
permisos_tenant_modify.withCheck: "permisos"."rol_id" in (select id from roles where tenant_id = (select current_tenant_id()) or tenant_id is null)

permisos_especiales_por_rol_tenant_modif.withCheck: "permisos_especiales_por_rol"."rol_id" in (select id from roles where tenant_id = (select current_tenant_id()) or tenant_id is null)

roles_tenant_nombre_unique.name: roles_tenant_nombre_unique
roles_tenant_nombre_unique.where: "roles"."tenant_id" is not null and "roles"."eliminado_en" is null
